JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.73.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.73.timecode":{"start":530.25,"end":534.36,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.74":{"text":"My mother, two aunts and one uncle, along with two family friends, sat in the audience, anxious.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.74.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.74.timecode":{"start":534.36,"end":542.27,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.75":{"text":"The man whose car I'd stolen quietly looked on.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.75.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.75.timecode":{"start":542.27,"end":546.04,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.76":{"text":"Back then, I would have said we hadn't injured him, but the truth is that PTSD is a real injury, and the pistol I waved in his face may stay with him still.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.76.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.76.timecode":{"start":546.04,"end":558.98,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.77":{"text":"My mother didn't testify.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.77.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.77.timecode":{"start":558.98,"end":560.59,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.78":{"text":"Bronchitis had taken her voice, but I knew heartbreak had left her unable to speak my name without crying.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.78.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.78.timecode":{"start":560.59,"end":568.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.79":{"text":"I couldn't forget how devastated she looked when I told her what I'd done.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.79.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.79.timecode":{"start":568.82,"end":574.18,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.80":{"text":"Three witnesses -- my Aunt Pandora and the two family friends -- spoke on my behalf.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.80.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.80.timecode":{"start":574.18,"end":581.34,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.81":{"text":"Their testimony was punctuated with the talk that troubles courtrooms where young black men are sentenced to prison: \"He was having difficulties making that adjustment of not having a father in the household.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.81.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.81.timecode":{"start":581.34,"end":596.64,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.82":{"text":"Before sentencing me, Judge F. Bruce Bach asked if I wanted to address the court.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.82.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.82.timecode":{"start":596.64,"end":603.31,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.83":{"text":"After apologizing to my mother, to my family, to the man I robbed, I told the court that I hadn't committed the crime because my father had no hand in raising me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.83.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.83.timecode":{"start":603.31,"end":613.86,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.84":{"text":"I said that it wasn't my mother's fault. But, so afraid of what might happen, I could barely articulate my regret.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.84.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.84.timecode":{"start":613.86,"end":624.11,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.85":{"text":"I couldn't explain how a confluence of bad decisions and opportunity led me to become the caricature of a black boy in America.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.85.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.85.timecode":{"start":624.11,"end":633.38,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.86":{"text":"The mandatory-minimum sentencing law demanded that the judge give me three years for the gun; he could have sent me to serve that time in a juvenile facility.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.86.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.86.timecode":{"start":633.38,"end":643.35,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.87":{"text":"Instead, he sentenced me to nine years in adult prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.87.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.87.timecode":{"start":643.35,"end":649.03,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.88":{"text":"My sentencing hearing began at 12:10 p.m.; 28 minutes later, deputies walked me, shackled and cuffed, back to my cell in the county jail.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.88.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.88.timecode":{"start":649.03,"end":663.33,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.89":{"text":"Later, leaning against a cinder-block wall, hoping to disappear, I called my Aunt Pandora.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.89.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.89.timecode":{"start":663.33,"end":673.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.90":{"text":"\"You heard the story of Terrence Johnson?\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.90.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.90.timecode":{"start":673.39,"end":675.67,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.91":{"text":"she asked me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.91.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.91.timecode":{"start":675.67,"end":677.45,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.92":{"text":"He was someone she'd known about from her high school days.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.92.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.92.timecode":{"start":677.45,"end":681.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.93":{"text":"Then she told me he was sent to prison as a 16-year-old and after serving more than a decade became a law student at the University of the District of Columbia.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.93.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.93.timecode":{"start":681.39,"end":692.16,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.94":{"text":"She probably imagined that this story would comfort me, but my surviving prison was too hypothetical for his success to matter then.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.94.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.94.timecode":{"start":692.16,"end":702.81,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.95":{"text":"This is how I think my clients saw things, too.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.95.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.95.timecode":{"start":702.81,"end":706.08,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.96":{"text":"Their problems were wildly complicated, and my success looked to them like Willy Wonka's golden ticket.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.96.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.96.timecode":{"start":706.08,"end":714.14,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.97":{"text":"A little while after my aunt told me Johnson's story, I saw on the news that he, barely two years out of prison, had committed suicide during a botched bank-robbery attempt.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.97.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.97.timecode":{"start":714.14,"end":728.18,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.98":{"text":"That I noticed.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.98.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.98.timecode":{"start":728.18,"end":730.77,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.99":{"text":"Afterward, I carried his story in my head.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.99.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.99.timecode":{"start":730.77,"end":734.53,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.100":{"text":"On some days, it was an anchor; on others, a caution.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.100.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.100.timecode":{"start":734.53,"end":739.836,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.101":{"text":"Several months later, after I was transferred from the Fairfax County jail to Virginia's Southampton Correctional Center, I met Markeese Turnage.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.101.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.101.timecode":{"start":745.59,"end":755.01,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.102":{"text":"Markeese -- Keese -- was my cellmate on the first floor of Building C2.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.102.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.102.timecode":{"start":755.01,"end":760.07,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.103":{"text":"We were both 17 but had been charged as adults.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.103.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.103.timecode":{"start":760.07,"end":764.78,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.104":{"text":"He was tall and skinny and generous, with an encyclopedic knowledge of Tupac.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.104.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.104.timecode":{"start":764.78,"end":770.72,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.105":{"text":"When some fools from Richmond wanted to rob me, they asked him to leave our cell door unlocked so that they could steal what I owned -- a little food from the commissary, a few books.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.105.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.105.timecode":{"start":770.72,"end":781.67,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.106":{"text":"He refused.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.106.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.106.timecode":{"start":781.67,"end":784.75,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.107":{"text":"Without saying it, we decided to trust each other, even in that unsettling place, surrounded by razor wire.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.107.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.107.timecode":{"start":784.75,"end":793.17,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.108":{"text":"We were like Conrad's secret sharers.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.108.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.108.timecode":{"start":793.17,"end":796.44,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.109":{"text":"If you'd looked into our cell at night, seeing the two of us exchanging our stories, me on the top bunk looking down, him sitting up slightly turned toward me, you might have imagined we were a single child, talking in whispers to his shadow.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.109.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.109.timecode":{"start":796.44,"end":812.95,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.110":{"text":"We pieced together the scraps of our identities in those conversations.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.110.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.110.timecode":{"start":812.95,"end":818,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.111":{"text":"I was my mother's only child; he, already a father, his namesake born the year he was convicted.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.111.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.111.timecode":{"start":818,"end":826.8,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.112":{"text":"Keese stole cars.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.112.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.112.timecode":{"start":826.8,"end":828.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.113":{"text":"He turned a rusted screwdriver into a skeleton key to the movable city.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.113.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.113.timecode":{"start":828.68,"end":833.32,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.114":{"text":"He got caught, and after, as is typical in most lockups, he was allowed to call his family.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.114.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.114.timecode":{"start":833.32,"end":840.8,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.115":{"text":"Whatever was said during that call crushed Keese.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.115.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.115.timecode":{"start":840.8,"end":845.59,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.116":{"text":"Later, while handcuffed, he grabbed an officer's gun and tried to turn it on himself.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.116.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.116.timecode":{"start":845.59,"end":852,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.117":{"text":"The gun never discharged.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.117.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.117.timecode":{"start":852,"end":854.63,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.118":{"text":"Officers claimed he tried to kill one of them.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.118.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.118.timecode":{"start":854.63,"end":857.94,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.119":{"text":"Keese was 17 when he was convicted of attempted capital murder with a gun and grand larceny auto; he was given 53 years in prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.119.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.119.timecode":{"start":857.94,"end":870.12,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.120":{"text":"Together we wrote a letter to the A.C.L.U. We were so naïve, we couldn't imagine they would decline to help a kid facing death in prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.120.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.120.timecode":{"start":870.12,"end":880.75,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.121":{"text":"This was 1998.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.121.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.121.timecode":{"start":880.75,"end":882.83,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.122":{"text":"Three years earlier, John DiIulio, a political scientist, published his essay \"The Coming of the Super-Predators\" in The Weekly Standard.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.122.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.122.timecode":{"start":882.83,"end":892.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.123":{"text":"DiIulio predicted that there would be 30,000 more juvenile robbers, murderers and rapists on the streets by the year 2000.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.123.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.123.timecode":{"start":892.57,"end":900.59,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.124":{"text":"That DiIulio was no oracle didn't matter.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.124.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.124.timecode":{"start":900.59,"end":904.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.125":{"text":"The Republican Party made prosecuting children as adults part of its national platform.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.125.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.125.timecode":{"start":904.93,"end":911.18,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.126":{"text":"Some Democrats embraced this idea as well.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.126.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.126.timecode":{"start":911.18,"end":914.37,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.127":{"text":"Hillary Clinton infamously said of juveniles in gangs, \"They are often the kinds of kids that are called 'superpredators.'","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.127.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.127.timecode":{"start":914.37,"end":923.64,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.128":{"text":"No conscience, no empathy, we can talk about why they ended up that way, but first we have to bring them to heel.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.128.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.128.timecode":{"start":923.64,"end":932.88,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.129":{"text":"Still, each day made it plain that we were children in an adult prison, and we hoped the A.C.L.U. would fight for Keese; instead, they mailed him a form letter declining to provide any assistance.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.129.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.129.timecode":{"start":932.88,"end":949.51,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.130":{"text":"By my 24th birthday, I had called five prisons home.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.130.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.130.timecode":{"start":949.51,"end":956.32,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.131":{"text":"One, Red Onion State Prison, was a high-security facility patrolled by armed guards and built in a mountaintop crater on an abandoned coal mine.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.131.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.131.timecode":{"start":956.32,"end":967.04,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.132":{"text":"I went to the hole five times, including 30 days for cursing and 10 for being punched in the eye.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.132.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.132.timecode":{"start":967.04,"end":974.23,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.133":{"text":"I sat on a cell floor and read Ernest J. Gaines's \"A Lesson Before Dying,\" from start to finish; cried while reading Edwidge Danticat's \"Krik?","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.133.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.133.timecode":{"start":974.23,"end":986.37,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.134":{"text":"Krak!\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.134.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.134.timecode":{"start":986.37,"end":987.3,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.135":{"text":"I read every book written by Richard Wright, all of Steinbeck and most of Alice Walker.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.135.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.135.timecode":{"start":987.3,"end":993.45,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.136":{"text":"I discovered the poetry of Robert Hayden, Lucille Clifton, Wanda Coleman and Agha Shahid Ali, and wrote 1,000 bad poems.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.136.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.136.timecode":{"start":993.45,"end":1004.69,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.137":{"text":"I completed a paralegal course and became a bootleg jailhouse lawyer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.137.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.137.timecode":{"start":1004.69,"end":1008.8,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.138":{"text":"I taught myself Spanish to speak the language of men I met from seven countries whom I'll most likely never see again.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.138.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.138.timecode":{"start":1008.8,"end":1017.46,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.139":{"text":"And once, I turned my back on a man being stabbed.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.139.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.139.timecode":{"start":1017.46,"end":1021.95,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.140":{"text":"I'd seen and heard enough to understand how prison ruins everyone: prisoners, guards, family, the ground it's built on.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.140.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.140.timecode":{"start":1021.95,"end":1033.349,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.141":{"text":"I left prison convinced that the third of my life lost to maximum security wouldn't haunt me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.141.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.141.timecode":{"start":1033.349,"end":1040.56,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.142":{"text":"I was wrong.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.142.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.142.timecode":{"start":1040.56,"end":1041.91,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.143":{"text":"On March 4, 2005, eight months before my 25th birthday, I arrived at my mother's home with the funk of prison, the lye soap, still clinging to my skin like a felony conviction.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.143.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.143.timecode":{"start":1046.46,"end":1059.72,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.144":{"text":"Twenty-four hours before that moment, I'd been at Coffeewood Correctional Facility on a weight-pile bench-pressing 295 pounds surrounded by men serving decades.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.144.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.144.timecode":{"start":1059.72,"end":1072.13,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.145":{"text":"My mother hugged me, then held me at arms' length to see my face.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.145.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.145.timecode":{"start":1072.13,"end":1077.32,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.146":{"text":"I returned a man with a scruffy beard who spoke too loudly.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.146.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.146.timecode":{"start":1077.32,"end":1082.86,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.147":{"text":"Though she had visited me often, I could see her taking in the disappeared years, as she tried to find the boy who left so long ago in the body of the man before her.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.147.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.147.timecode":{"start":1082.86,"end":1097.17,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.148":{"text":"My mother's townhouse looked vacant.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.148.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.148.timecode":{"start":1097.17,"end":1099.67,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.149":{"text":"\"I wanted to surprise you,\" she told me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.149.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.149.timecode":{"start":1099.67,"end":1103.54,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.150":{"text":"Remnants of the life I'd left threatened to burst from boxes on the floor, waiting to be moved into a single-family home she had just purchased --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.150.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.150.timecode":{"start":1103.54,"end":1113.75,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.151":{"text":"a place with a backyard that needed a son to mow it.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.151.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.151.timecode":{"start":1113.75,"end":1117.65,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.152":{"text":"A place where people whose children don't go to prison lived.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.152.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.152.timecode":{"start":1117.65,"end":1121.89,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.153":{"text":"My mother worked at the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.153.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.153.timecode":{"start":1121.89,"end":1126,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.154":{"text":"She was also a reservist in the Navy who served active duty in Iraq after Sept.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.154.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.154.timecode":{"start":1126,"end":1131.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.155":{"text":"11.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.155.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.155.timecode":{"start":1131.39,"end":1132.29,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.156":{"text":"She saved for around 25 years to buy the single-family home that awaited me on my release from prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.156.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.156.timecode":{"start":1132.29,"end":1141.84,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.157":{"text":"That first night home, Marcus picked me up from my mom's house.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.157.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.157.timecode":{"start":1141.84,"end":1146.18,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.158":{"text":"We hadn't been free together since more than a dozen officers had pointed their guns at our heads in a parking lot near the Pentagon City mall where we were caught.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.158.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.158.timecode":{"start":1146.18,"end":1156.51,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.159":{"text":"Marcus now worked at Duron Paints, a store on 14th and Clifton in Northwest Washington, half a block from Ben's Chili Bowl.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.159.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.159.timecode":{"start":1156.51,"end":1165.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.160":{"text":"Duron's employment application included the question, \"Have you been convicted of a felony over the past seven years?\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.160.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.160.timecode":{"start":1165.82,"end":1174.4,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.161":{"text":"Our crimes were almost a decade old.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.161.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.161.timecode":{"start":1174.4,"end":1177.79,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.162":{"text":"Marcus checked no.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.162.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.162.timecode":{"start":1177.79,"end":1180.18,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.163":{"text":"Still needing to explain his thin employment history, he reinvented himself as a recent college student who had nearly earned an associate degree.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.163.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.163.timecode":{"start":1180.18,"end":1190.35,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.164":{"text":"He never mentioned that he received the college credits while incarcerated at the Brunswick Correctional Center.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.164.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.164.timecode":{"start":1190.35,"end":1197.44,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.165":{"text":"I came home lacking even that.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.165.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.165.timecode":{"start":1197.44,"end":1200.65,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.166":{"text":"Living in one jail and five prisons, I was never offered a single opportunity to further my formal education.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.166.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.166.timecode":{"start":1200.65,"end":1208.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.167":{"text":"I came home with far more sense than I had the night a pistol nearly ruined my life, but not a single thing I could put on a résumé.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.167.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.167.timecode":{"start":1208.82,"end":1219.06,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.168":{"text":"Marcus hooked me up with an interview at Duron.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.168.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.168.timecode":{"start":1219.06,"end":1221.99,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.169":{"text":"The interviewer, a black man in his 30s, asked me questions about my life.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.169.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.169.timecode":{"start":1221.99,"end":1228.32,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.170":{"text":"Everything I said that morning was a lie --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.170.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.170.timecode":{"start":1228.32,"end":1232.2,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.171":{"text":"I talked about moving to Virginia to be with my grandmother, about pursuing a career as a writer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.171.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.171.timecode":{"start":1232.2,"end":1238.4,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.172":{"text":"I knew the truth wouldn't get me employed: 24 years old, eight years in prison, no job experience.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.172.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.172.timecode":{"start":1238.4,"end":1246.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.173":{"text":"I walked out of my interview with an entry-level job.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.173.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.173.timecode":{"start":1246.68,"end":1250.28,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.174":{"text":"But most people with criminal records cannot sidestep their felony convictions.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.174.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.174.timecode":{"start":1250.28,"end":1255.64,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.175":{"text":"A month later, two black men entered Duron job hunting.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.175.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.175.timecode":{"start":1255.64,"end":1260.61,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.176":{"text":"They confessed their stints in a Washington jail to the manager.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.176.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.176.timecode":{"start":1260.61,"end":1264.26,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.177":{"text":"When they left, applications in hand, someone made a joke about ex-cons.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.177.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.177.timecode":{"start":1264.26,"end":1270.09,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.178":{"text":"Laughter followed.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.178.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.178.timecode":{"start":1270.09,"end":1272.01,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.179":{"text":"I knew they'd never be hired.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.179.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.179.timecode":{"start":1272.01,"end":1275.84,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.180":{"text":"According to the Oxford English Dictionary, the word \"felon\" once meant a vile or wicked person, a villain, wretch or monster, and was sometimes applied to the devil or an evil spirit.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.180.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.180.timecode":{"start":1275.84,"end":1289.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.181":{"text":"No wonder once the word is associated with your name, everything becomes more difficult. Unlike Duron Paints, most employers ask applicants if they have ever been convicted of a crime.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.181.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.181.timecode":{"start":1289.39,"end":1302.3,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.182":{"text":"This question, known as the box, condemns many with criminal records to joblessness.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.182.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.182.timecode":{"start":1302.3,"end":1309.62,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.183":{"text":"In 1998, Hawaii passed the first legislation barring public and private employers from asking about an applicant's criminal history before a conditional employment offer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.183.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.183.timecode":{"start":1309.62,"end":1322.62,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.184":{"text":"Five years later, All of Us or None, a project created by people with criminal records, started what became known as the ban-the-box campaign.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.184.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.184.timecode":{"start":1322.62,"end":1333.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.185":{"text":"Since then more than 30 states and the federal government have enacted varying fair-hiring practices through legislation and executive orders.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.185.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.185.timecode":{"start":1333.57,"end":1344.1,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.186":{"text":"Under some, criminal-history inquiries must wait until a job offer is made; others preclude denying employment solely based on the existence of a criminal record; 11 states mandate the removal of criminal-history questions by private employers.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.186.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.186.timecode":{"start":1344.1,"end":1362.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.187":{"text":"Still, discrimination persists.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.187.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.187.timecode":{"start":1362.47,"end":1365.41,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.188":{"text":"In a July 2018 report, \"Out of Prison and Out of Work,\" the Prison Policy Initiative, a criminal-justice public-policy think tank in Northampton, Mass., wrote that formerly incarcerated people are unemployed at a rate \"higher than the total U.S. unemployment rate during any historical period,","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.188.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.188.timecode":{"start":1365.41,"end":1387.6,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.189":{"text":"including the Great Depression.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.189.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.189.timecode":{"start":1387.6,"end":1389.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.190":{"text":"In recent years, the N.A.A.C.P. Legal Defense Fund joined a class-action lawsuit against Target claiming that, by preventing \"applicants with arrest or irrelevant conviction records from obtaining employment opportunities,\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.190.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.190.timecode":{"start":1389.93,"end":1405.63,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.191":{"text":"the company had discriminated against African-American and Latino applicants.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.191.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.191.timecode":{"start":1405.63,"end":1410.54,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.192":{"text":"This past April, Target settled for $3.74 million.","speaker":"J. D.
