JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.192.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.192.timecode":{"start":1410.54,"end":1418.24,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.193":{"text":"State and federal licensing regulations often block people from entering certain professions before they ever touch an application.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.193.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.193.timecode":{"start":1418.24,"end":1426.64,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.194":{"text":"The American Bar Association has documented more than 25,000 state restrictions on occupational licenses.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.194.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.194.timecode":{"start":1426.64,"end":1434.8,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.195":{"text":"A felony conviction restricts access to professions as disparate as teaching, purchasing precious stones and metals, becoming a private investigator or operating a funeral home.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.195.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.195.timecode":{"start":1434.8,"end":1447.34,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.196":{"text":"Many careers -- for example, firefighting, athletic training and dentistry -- can be threatened by even a misdemeanor conviction.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.196.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.196.timecode":{"start":1447.34,"end":1456.29,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.197":{"text":"Whether you can vote after a felony conviction depends on where you live.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.197.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.197.timecode":{"start":1456.29,"end":1459.97,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.198":{"text":"Some states permanently disenfranchise felons; others require that they complete their prison sentence and any term of probation or parole; only Maine and Vermont let all citizens vote, imprisoned or not.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.198.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.198.timecode":{"start":1459.97,"end":1474.4,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.199":{"text":"In Virginia, felons cannot vote without having their rights restored by the governor; in Maryland, at the time I returned, I had to wait until I'd gotten off probation.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.199.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.199.timecode":{"start":1474.4,"end":1486.87,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.200":{"text":"Today in Maryland, a person can vote the day he or she walks out of prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.200.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.200.timecode":{"start":1486.87,"end":1492.36,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.201":{"text":"By the time Marcus was out of prison for eight years, he had started a tech company called Flikshop.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.201.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.201.timecode":{"start":1494.95,"end":1501.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.202":{"text":"Through its app, Flikshop allows people to mail cellphone photos as postcards to people in prison, transforming how loved ones communicate with one another.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.202.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.202.timecode":{"start":1501.68,"end":1513.12,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.203":{"text":"But when he applied to rent an apartment from a private property developer, the fact that he was a small-business owner with excellent credit didn't outweigh the felonies we shared.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.203.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.203.timecode":{"start":1513.12,"end":1524.15,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.204":{"text":"People in public housing fare worse.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.204.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.204.timecode":{"start":1524.15,"end":1527.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.205":{"text":"Brian Gilmore, a Michigan State law professor who was a tenant attorney in Washington during the late 1990s, says that after Congress passed President Bill Clinton's 1996 Housing Opportunity Program Extension Act, which made it easier for public housing agencies","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.205.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.205.timecode":{"start":1527.47,"end":1545.99,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.206":{"text":"to evict tenants for drug use or criminal convictions, he frequently represented clients who were removed from public housing under the new policy.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.206.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.206.timecode":{"start":1545.99,"end":1555.69,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.207":{"text":"By 2002, the Supreme Court had taken it a step further, ruling in the case Department of Housing and Urban Development v. Rucker that public housing authorities could evict tenants for the drug-related activity of household members or guests,","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.207.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.207.timecode":{"start":1555.69,"end":1573.11,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.208":{"text":"even if the tenant had no knowledge of the criminal activity.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.208.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.208.timecode":{"start":1573.11,"end":1576.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.209":{"text":"Though not mandatory, these policies are still in effect today.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.209.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.209.timecode":{"start":1576.82,"end":1582.94,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.210":{"text":"The Personal Responsibility and Work Opportunity Reconciliation Act and Higher Education Amendments, two other Clinton-era policies passed in 1996 and 1998, respectively, made it more difficult for people with felony drug convictions","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.210.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.210.timecode":{"start":1582.94,"end":1598.73,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.211":{"text":"to receive food stamps, public assistance and college financial aid.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.211.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.211.timecode":{"start":1598.73,"end":1603.85,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.212":{"text":"President Barack Obama relaxed some of the restrictions on accessing Pell grants, and only a handful of states continue to enforce the bans on food stamps and public assistance.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.212.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.212.timecode":{"start":1603.85,"end":1615.99,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.213":{"text":"These policies become another punishment, disastrous for people coming out of prison, struggling to remember how to be part of society -- one that seems to want them to fail.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.213.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.213.timecode":{"start":1615.99,"end":1628.44,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.214":{"text":"In May 2005, two months after I was released from prison, I walked into an adviser's office at the University of Maryland.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.214.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.214.timecode":{"start":1631.15,"end":1639.71,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.215":{"text":"I told him I wanted to start college as soon as I could, that week if possible.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.215.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.215.timecode":{"start":1639.71,"end":1645.19,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.216":{"text":"He stared, as if I'd lost my mind, as if he were waiting for the punch line.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.216.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.216.timecode":{"start":1645.19,"end":1651.34,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.217":{"text":"\"Young man, we've chosen the class of 2009.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.217.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.217.timecode":{"start":1651.34,"end":1654.66,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.218":{"text":"I didn't understand.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.218.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.218.timecode":{"start":1654.66,"end":1657.86,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.219":{"text":"\"Oh, that's cool, I want to start now, not 2009.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.219.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.219.timecode":{"start":1657.86,"end":1661.58,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.220":{"text":"I'd left prison with enough money for bus fare and a fast-food meal -- but without the knowledge of how to enroll in college.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.220.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.220.timecode":{"start":1661.58,"end":1671.41,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.221":{"text":"It had taken me nine trips to the D.M.V. to get my license, each time learning that a different thing was needed: proof of residence, Social Security card, birth certificate.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.221.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.221.timecode":{"start":1671.41,"end":1683.1,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.222":{"text":"I'd just learned to search for things on the internet and had barely set up an email account.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.222.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.222.timecode":{"start":1683.1,"end":1690.84,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.223":{"text":"I told the adviser the story that I wanted to erase: carjacking at 16, prison, recent release.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.223.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.223.timecode":{"start":1690.84,"end":1698.97,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.224":{"text":"Outside his office, the university spread out into a vast landscape of green.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.224.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.224.timecode":{"start":1698.97,"end":1706.08,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.225":{"text":"He suggested that I enroll at Prince George's Community College.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.225.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.225.timecode":{"start":1706.08,"end":1710.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.226":{"text":"After a semester, or maybe a year, he said, I'd be ready to transfer to Maryland.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.226.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.226.timecode":{"start":1710.47,"end":1717.85,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.227":{"text":"A week later, my Aunt Pandora took me to a gospel concert at Bowie State University.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.227.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.227.timecode":{"start":1717.85,"end":1723.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.228":{"text":"Karibu, an independent African-American bookstore with multiple locations in the area, had a table set up outside the concert hall with stacks of books, many familiar to me from my prison reading: \"The Destruction of Black Civilization,\" by Chancellor Williams;","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.228.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.228.timecode":{"start":1723.47,"end":1741.49,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.229":{"text":"\"Under a Soprano Sky,\" by Sonia Sanchez; \"The Miseducation of the Negro,\" by Carter Godson Woodson.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.229.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.229.timecode":{"start":1741.49,"end":1749.01,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.230":{"text":"I talked to Yao Glover, the bookseller, for an hour about literature.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.230.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.230.timecode":{"start":1749.01,"end":1754.21,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.231":{"text":"\"Where'd you go to school?\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.231.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.231.timecode":{"start":1754.21,"end":1756.11,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.232":{"text":"he asked.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.232.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.232.timecode":{"start":1756.11,"end":1757.34,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.233":{"text":"It was the first time outside prison that someone thought me college-educated.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.233.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.233.timecode":{"start":1757.34,"end":1762.76,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.234":{"text":"I didn't have an answer, and so I told the truth: \"Man, I just got out of prison.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.234.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.234.timecode":{"start":1762.76,"end":1769.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.235":{"text":"Yao turned out to be one of Karibu's owners.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.235.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.235.timecode":{"start":1769.47,"end":1773.15,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.236":{"text":"Days later, the manager at the Bowie location called and asked if I'd be interested in an opening there.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.236.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.236.timecode":{"start":1773.15,"end":1780.55,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.237":{"text":"By summer's end, I had enrolled full time in Prince George's Community College and had a full-time gig at Karibu selling black literature to strangers.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.237.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.237.timecode":{"start":1780.55,"end":1791.78,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.238":{"text":"On Sept.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.238.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.238.timecode":{"start":1794.75,"end":1795.25,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.239":{"text":"19, 2005, I rushed from an 8 a.m. class to open the bookstore.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.239.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.239.timecode":{"start":1795.25,"end":1801.08,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.240":{"text":"\"Good morning, welcome to Karibu,\" I said, instinctively, when the bell announced the day's first customer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.240.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.240.timecode":{"start":1801.08,"end":1808.89,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.241":{"text":"Terese Roberson smiled.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.241.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.241.timecode":{"start":1808.89,"end":1811.65,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.242":{"text":"She wore bluejeans, a black T-shirt and black New Balance sneakers.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.242.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.242.timecode":{"start":1811.65,"end":1817.41,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.243":{"text":"Also a student at the community college, she had come to the store to buy Mario Azevedo's \"Africana Studies\" for her African-American studies course.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.243.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.243.timecode":{"start":1817.41,"end":1827.42,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.244":{"text":"We talked for a good minute.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.244.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.244.timecode":{"start":1827.42,"end":1829.32,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.245":{"text":"I read her an elegy that I'd written for a friend murdered in high school.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.245.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.245.timecode":{"start":1829.32,"end":1834.59,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.246":{"text":"I was afraid to ask her out.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.246.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.246.timecode":{"start":1834.59,"end":1837.12,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.247":{"text":"For six months, I thought about her without once seeing her face in the halls of the college.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.247.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.247.timecode":{"start":1837.12,"end":1843.65,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.248":{"text":"Then, during the next semester's final-exam period, I remember running into her three times in a week.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.248.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.248.timecode":{"start":1843.65,"end":1851.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.249":{"text":"The third time, I persuaded her to have lunch with me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.249.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.249.timecode":{"start":1851.68,"end":1857.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.250":{"text":"After our first couple of dates, I began wondering if I owed Terese the story of my time in prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.250.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.250.timecode":{"start":1857.39,"end":1864.46,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.251":{"text":"I'd come home believing that keeping quiet about what I experienced was best.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.251.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.251.timecode":{"start":1864.46,"end":1870.38,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.252":{"text":"Nearly every password I created back then reflected that thinking: 1Silence, NeedSilence, WantSilence, as if muteness could save me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.252.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.252.timecode":{"start":1870.38,"end":1882.86,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.253":{"text":"But by the time we went out, I'd become accustomed to confessing that I carjacked a man.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.253.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.253.timecode":{"start":1882.86,"end":1889.05,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.254":{"text":"Often, with potential employers, with schools, my criminal record would come up early and derail future conversations.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.254.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.254.timecode":{"start":1889.05,"end":1898.2,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.255":{"text":"With Terese things were different.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.255.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.255.timecode":{"start":1898.2,"end":1901.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.256":{"text":"Maybe because I didn't act as if the penitentiary had swallowed a third of my life.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.256.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.256.timecode":{"start":1901.82,"end":1907.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.257":{"text":"She looked at me as if she knew the telling pained me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.257.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.257.timecode":{"start":1907.57,"end":1911.92,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.258":{"text":"And I think, maybe, my sadness was part of the reason she answered the next time I called.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.258.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.258.timecode":{"start":1911.92,"end":1918.15,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.259":{"text":"Two years later, Terese and I prepared to graduate from Prince George's Community College.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.259.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.259.timecode":{"start":1924.1,"end":1930.02,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.260":{"text":"I'd cross the stage as an Honors Academy scholar, a program that provided its members seamless transfer to several local universities, including Howard, the historically black university in Washington.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.260.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.260.timecode":{"start":1930.02,"end":1945.43,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.261":{"text":"I was completing an application, expecting to be a Howard Bison, until I got to this question: \"Have you ever been adjudicated guilty or convicted of a misdemeanor, felony or other crime?\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.261.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.261.timecode":{"start":1945.43,"end":1960.59,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.262":{"text":"The question made me stop.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.262.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.262.timecode":{"start":1960.59,"end":1963.36,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.263":{"text":"I feared that my enrollment was already in jeopardy.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.263.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.263.timecode":{"start":1963.36,"end":1967.45,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.264":{"text":"A few weeks later, Dr. Melinda Frederick, then the coordinator of the Honors Academy, and I went to Howard to sign my enrollment papers.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.264.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.264.timecode":{"start":1967.45,"end":1977.26,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.265":{"text":"An admissions officer paused when we told her about my felonies.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.265.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.265.timecode":{"start":1977.26,"end":1982.12,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.266":{"text":"She told us that in the past, Howard had at times declined to admit students who had criminal records.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.266.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.266.timecode":{"start":1982.12,"end":1989.08,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.267":{"text":"\"But don't worry,\" she said.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.267.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.267.timecode":{"start":1989.08,"end":1991.75,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.268":{"text":"\"We'll get back to you shortly.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.268.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.268.timecode":{"start":1991.75,"end":1994.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.269":{"text":"They never did.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.269.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.269.timecode":{"start":1994.47,"end":1996.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.270":{"text":"Recently, more than a decade later, I called to find out what happened.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.270.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.270.timecode":{"start":1996.93,"end":2003.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.271":{"text":"Howard says its records list my application as incomplete.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.271.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.271.timecode":{"start":2003.68,"end":2008.55,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.272":{"text":"When I asked if there were a policy to decline admissions to people with criminal records, a university spokeswoman said that applications by people with criminal records are evaluated on a case-by-case basis.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.272.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.272.timecode":{"start":2008.55,"end":2023.01,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.273":{"text":"I applied to the University of Maryland and was admitted with a full-tuition academic scholarship.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.273.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.273.timecode":{"start":2023.01,"end":2029.21,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.274":{"text":"Terese, pregnant with our first son, Micah Michael-Zamir, was accepted at Towson State University.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.274.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.274.timecode":{"start":2029.21,"end":2037.25,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.275":{"text":"After my two years at Maryland, I was chosen by a group of deans and administrators to give our graduation's student commencement address.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.275.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.275.timecode":{"start":2037.25,"end":2046.78,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.276":{"text":"Before more than 15,000 people -- classmates, professors, friends and family members --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.276.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.276.timecode":{"start":2046.78,"end":2054.31,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.277":{"text":"I told the audience that I had served eight years and three months in prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.277.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.277.timecode":{"start":2054.31,"end":2059.719,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.278":{"text":"I made my criminal record, even in the middle of an accomplishment, visible -- brutally permanent.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.278.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.278.timecode":{"start":2059.719,"end":2067.179,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.279":{"text":"A tattoo.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.279.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.279.timecode":{"start":2067.179,"end":2068.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.280":{"text":"That's how I saw it.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.280.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.280.timecode":{"start":2068.82,"end":2070.78,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.281":{"text":"And if I was going to be scarred, I wanted to reveal it myself.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.281.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.281.timecode":{"start":2070.78,"end":2075,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.282":{"text":"Before my 30th birthday, I'd earned a bachelor's degree and an M.F.A. in poetry; published \"A Question of Freedom,\" a memoir about my time in prison; published a collection of poetry, \"Shahid Reads His Own Palm\"; and still knew my state number by heart.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.282.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.282.timecode":{"start":2077.81,"end":2097.139,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.283":{"text":"I applied for just about every teaching gig at colleges and private schools in the Washington area without getting a single interview.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.283.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.283.timecode":{"start":2097.139,"end":2105.64,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.284":{"text":"Peers without records -- and some without publications -- were getting jobs, or at least interviews.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.284.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.284.timecode":{"start":2105.64,"end":2113.94,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.285":{"text":"My first job in prison, washing dishes, sweeping and mopping floors in the kitchen, paid 23 cents an hour.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.285.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.285.timecode":{"start":2113.94,"end":2122.72,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.286":{"text":"Some days I felt I had a better chance of getting that job back than teaching poetry at a nearby school.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.286.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.286.timecode":{"start":2122.72,"end":2131.03,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.287":{"text":"I stretched my job search to all of the United States.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.287.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.287.timecode":{"start":2131.03,"end":2135.42,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.288":{"text":"Terese, completing her master's degree in occupational therapy, was pregnant with our second son, Miles Thelonious, who was born on Oct.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.288.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.288.timecode":{"start":2135.42,"end":2144.23,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.289":{"text":"10, 2011.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.289.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.289.timecode":{"start":2144.23,"end":2144.73,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.290":{"text":"And I was gravid with fear: unemployed and too embarrassed to admit to Terese that I worried I'd never be gainfully employed, able to pay the rent or purchase diapers.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.290.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.290.timecode":{"start":2144.73,"end":2160.25,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.291":{"text":"Then one day in March 2011, the director of Harvard's Radcliffe Institute for Advanced Study left a phone message offering me a Radcliffe fellowship to finish working on the collection of poems that would become \"Bastards of the Reagan Era,\" published in 2015.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.291.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.291.timecode":{"start":2160.25,"end":2177.77,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.292":{"text":"I listened to the message five times, elated and disbelieving.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.292.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.292.timecode":{"start":2177.77,"end":2184.7,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.293":{"text":"Applying for the fellowship had been a Hail Mary.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.293.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.293.timecode":{"start":2184.7,"end":2188.61,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.294":{"text":"And then we were moving to Massachusetts, 300 miles away from the only family we knew, a little boy barely potty-trained in tow and another on the way.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.294.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.294.timecode":{"start":2188.61,"end":2201.45,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.295":{"text":"About a year later, apprehensive about trying and failing to get a teaching job, I decided to apply to law school.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.295.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.295.timecode":{"start":2201.45,"end":2210.16,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.296":{"text":"I figured that at least for three years, my student loan bill wouldn't be due each month.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.296.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.296.timecode":{"start":2210.16,"end":2215.61,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.297":{"text":"The first sentence of my personal statement read, \"The part of my life that has been most influential in my drive to go to law school is also the greatest obstacle to my being admitted to law school and becoming an attorney.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.297.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.297.timecode":{"start":2215.61,"end":2232.23,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.298":{"text":"By April 2013, I'd been accepted to law schools at Yale, Harvard, Columbia, the University of Michigan, Georgetown, the University of Pennsylvania, Northwestern and Boston College; told yes by one school for every year I'd been in prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.298.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.298.timecode":{"start":2232.23,"end":2253.95,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.299":{"text":"Before I was admitted to Northwestern, Clifford Zimmerman, then dean of students, called me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.299.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.299.timecode":{"start":2253.95,"end":2261.56,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.300":{"text":"He asked me to tell him something that wasn't on my résumé.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.300.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.300.timecode":{"start":2261.56,"end":2265.46,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.301":{"text":"We talked about the book club for 6-to-17-year-old black boys, YoungMenRead, that I started while at Karibu Books; about my sons; about Terese.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.301.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.301.timecode":{"start":2265.46,"end":2277.74,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.302":{"text":"We talked about the character and fitness challenges I might confront later.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.302.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.302.timecode":{"start":2277.74,"end":2282.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.303":{"text":"He didn't ask about prison, though he did give me the names of lawyers in three states who might assist me when it came time to be admitted to the bar.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.303.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.303.timecode":{"start":2282.68,"end":2292.19,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.304":{"text":"Even before I began law school, I knew what was ahead of me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.304.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.304.timecode":{"start":2292.19,"end":2298.34,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.305":{"text":"I enrolled at Yale Law School just shy of my 33rd birthday.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.305.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.305.timecode":{"start":2298.34,"end":2303.44,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.306":{"text":"During admitted-students weekend, the dean, Robert Post, gave my 1L class a speech.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.306.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.306.timecode":{"start":2303.44,"end":2310.77,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.307":{"text":"In our number, he said, was a Cordon Bleu chef, military officers, a poet -- me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.307.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.307.timecode":{"start":2310.77,"end":2320.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.308":{"text":"He didn't say that among us was a person formerly incarcerated, a felon, an ex-con --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.308.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.308.timecode":{"start":2320.39,"end":2327.26,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.309":{"text":"he said \"poet.\"","speaker":"J. D.
