JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.309.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.309.timecode":{"start":2327.26,"end":2330.14,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.310":{"text":"I imagined that I'd begun to outpace the worst of my past.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.310.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.310.timecode":{"start":2330.14,"end":2335.53,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.311":{"text":"Until one day Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor came to Yale for a public conversation with the former New York Times legal correspondent Linda Greenhouse.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.311.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.311.timecode":{"start":2335.53,"end":2347.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.312":{"text":"During the discussion, Greenhouse asked why the term \"undocumented immigrant\" was more accurate than \"illegal alien.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.312.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.312.timecode":{"start":2347.68,"end":2356.85,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.313":{"text":"Justice Sotomayor replied that \"many of these people are people I know, and they are no different than the people I grew up with or who share my life.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.313.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.313.timecode":{"start":2356.85,"end":2367.31,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.314":{"text":"And they are human beings with a serious legal problem --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.314.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.314.timecode":{"start":2367.31,"end":2371.18,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.315":{"text":"but the word 'illegal alien' made them sound like those other kinds of criminals.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.315.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.315.timecode":{"start":2371.18,"end":2377.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.316":{"text":"And I think people then paint those individuals as something less than worthy human beings.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.316.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.316.timecode":{"start":2377.93,"end":2383.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.317":{"text":"My classmates applauded.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.317.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.317.timecode":{"start":2383.82,"end":2386.19,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.318":{"text":"I sank into the chair, unable to stretch my legs, like a man constrained by shackles --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.318.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.318.timecode":{"start":2386.19,"end":2394.19,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.319":{"text":"understanding that for many people, I was one of \"those other kinds of criminals.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.319.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.319.timecode":{"start":2394.19,"end":2401.1,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.320":{"text":"A few weeks after the Sotomayor event, Micah's kindergarten teacher told me that one of his classmates, having overheard a conversation between his parents, had told Micah that I'd stolen a car and went to jail.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.320.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.320.timecode":{"start":2401.1,"end":2414.81,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.321":{"text":"He and Miles, who was 2, were at a local private school.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.321.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.321.timecode":{"start":2414.81,"end":2419.72,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.322":{"text":"Terese and I had grappled with what to tell their teachers about my past.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.322.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.322.timecode":{"start":2419.72,"end":2424.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.323":{"text":"We opted for silence, maybe without ever really agreeing on it.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.323.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.323.timecode":{"start":2424.57,"end":2429.22,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.324":{"text":"Micah's teacher told me that he had cried and was visibly upset --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.324.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.324.timecode":{"start":2429.22,"end":2434.09,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.325":{"text":"but he was now O.K. And I couldn't help wondering what \"now O.K.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.325.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.325.timecode":{"start":2434.09,"end":2440.34,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.326":{"text":"meant.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.326.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.326.timecode":{"start":2440.34,"end":2442.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.327":{"text":"That afternoon, when Micah came home, we sat at the dining room table to talk.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.327.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.327.timecode":{"start":2442.47,"end":2448.36,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.328":{"text":"Prison has always been the distance between the world and me, but that distance didn't matter until I realized it also became the distance between me and my sons.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.328.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.328.timecode":{"start":2448.36,"end":2459.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.329":{"text":"Terese and I had never discussed when we might tell them -- yet we expected to dictate that when.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.329.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.329.timecode":{"start":2459.82,"end":2467.51,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.330":{"text":"But we hadn't.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.330.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.330.timecode":{"start":2467.51,"end":2469.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.331":{"text":"Everything Micah had known about me had collapsed into a word: jail.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.331.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.331.timecode":{"start":2469.39,"end":2475.65,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.332":{"text":"I didn't know if I was O.K. but was certain that he couldn't be.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.332.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.332.timecode":{"start":2475.65,"end":2480.91,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.333":{"text":"Micah, this is what happened.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.333.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.333.timecode":{"start":2480.91,"end":2484.14,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.334":{"text":"And I explained, though not everything.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.334.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.334.timecode":{"start":2484.14,"end":2487.97,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.335":{"text":"Instead of a pistol and a man being told to \"get the [expletive] out\" of the car and then prison and the rest, it was just: I stole a car and went to jail.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.335.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.335.timecode":{"start":2487.97,"end":2499.35,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.336":{"text":"He asked me how long.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.336.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.336.timecode":{"start":2499.35,"end":2501.69,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.337":{"text":"When I told him eight years, I could see in his eyes that he was struggling with what it meant for me to have been in prison longer than he'd been alive.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.337.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.337.timecode":{"start":2501.69,"end":2511.21,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.338":{"text":"Eight years.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.338.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.338.timecode":{"start":2511.21,"end":2513.76,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.339":{"text":"\"But don't bad people go to jail, Daddy?\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.339.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.339.timecode":{"start":2513.76,"end":2517.33,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.340":{"text":"Micah's voice sounded like the air whistling out of a balloon.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.340.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.340.timecode":{"start":2517.33,"end":2522.51,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.341":{"text":"I was a first-year law student, explaining how prison, how crime, was never just about being bad.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.341.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.341.timecode":{"start":2522.51,"end":2531.22,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.342":{"text":"I also recognized that conversations about criminal-justice reform and the new Jim Crow were convenient ways to avoid admitting I'd pulled a gun on a man without a good reason.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.342.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.342.timecode":{"start":2531.22,"end":2543.88,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.343":{"text":"I wondered if there was room for me to escape being characterized as bad by the 6-year-old boy who first made me feel free.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.343.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.343.timecode":{"start":2543.88,"end":2552.85,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.344":{"text":"The morning of law-school commencement in May 2016, my classmates and I gathered with thousands of students in the center of Yale's campus.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.344.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.344.timecode":{"start":2555.76,"end":2565.38,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.345":{"text":"It was just over 19 years to the date of my sentencing.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.345.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.345.timecode":{"start":2565.38,"end":2569.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.346":{"text":"I carried the law-school flag, leading the graduates from that yard to the college's Old Campus.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.346.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.346.timecode":{"start":2569.57,"end":2576.84,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.347":{"text":"We walked the old colonial streets, crossing Elm, making a left turn onto High Street.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.347.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.347.timecode":{"start":2576.84,"end":2583.72,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.348":{"text":"From somewhere in the crowd, my cousin Reds watched, seeing me lead the procession in a Yale blue gown with a purple hood draped across my back.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.348.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.348.timecode":{"start":2583.72,"end":2597,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.349":{"text":"Arrested at age 14, he had recently been released after 15 years in prison, about two decades before his original sentence was set to finish.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.349.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.349.timecode":{"start":2597,"end":2607.59,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.350":{"text":"His early release was unexpected, mercy from a judge whose reasons I cannot begin to divine.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.350.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.350.timecode":{"start":2607.59,"end":2615.37,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.351":{"text":"But what do you do with a second chance that no one prepared you for?","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.351.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.351.timecode":{"start":2615.37,"end":2619.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.352":{"text":"No prison officials would have thought it their responsibility to teach Reds anything more than standing for count.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.352.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.352.timecode":{"start":2619.57,"end":2627.25,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.353":{"text":"When he came home at age 29, tattoos adorned his body, and he had long dreadlocks that he sheared to appear more employable.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.353.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.353.timecode":{"start":2627.25,"end":2636.98,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.354":{"text":"He had participated in the job-training programs suggested by his probation officer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.354.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.354.timecode":{"start":2636.98,"end":2642.64,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.355":{"text":"He had learned to write a résumé, though 15 years of prison gives little to seduce an employer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.355.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.355.timecode":{"start":2642.64,"end":2649.91,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.356":{"text":"Nothing worked.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.356.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.356.timecode":{"start":2649.91,"end":2651.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.357":{"text":"During the next two years, he would be denied dozens of jobs.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.357.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.357.timecode":{"start":2651.93,"end":2657.45,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.358":{"text":"Job applications became a wall preventing him from ever speaking to a person with the authority to hire him, from having the opportunity to explain that he was more than his crime and time in prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.358.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.358.timecode":{"start":2657.45,"end":2670.3,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.359":{"text":"He teetered on the verge of homelessness.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.359.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.359.timecode":{"start":2670.3,"end":2674.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.360":{"text":"I watched and didn't do nearly enough.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.360.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.360.timecode":{"start":2674.57,"end":2678.87,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.361":{"text":"What Reds needed most -- time to both fail and grow --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.361.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.361.timecode":{"start":2678.87,"end":2683.53,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.362":{"text":"no one was willing to offer him.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.362.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.362.timecode":{"start":2683.53,"end":2686.78,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.363":{"text":"I was graduating from one of the best law schools in the world.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.363.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.363.timecode":{"start":2686.78,"end":2690.96,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.364":{"text":"Still, I was worried that despite my degree, I'd be prevented from practicing law.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.364.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.364.timecode":{"start":2690.96,"end":2698.06,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.365":{"text":"And so our situations were similar and dissimilar; though it seems peculiar to suggest that graduating with a Yale law degree leaves anyone, no matter how many felonies he has, in a situation as desperate as Reds's.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.365.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.365.timecode":{"start":2698.06,"end":2713.81,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.366":{"text":"When I was given J.'s case, a few months after my graduation, he had been incarcerated for a month.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.366.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.366.timecode":{"start":2718.03,"end":2725.1,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.367":{"text":"J. was already 18, and the charges he faced were serious enough that a long prison sentence was a possibility.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.367.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.367.timecode":{"start":2725.1,"end":2733.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.368":{"text":"The only information I had about J.'s case was a video of police officers interviewing him; another one of officers interviewing the victim, a kid my client's age, and his mother; and a few charging documents.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.368.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.368.timecode":{"start":2733.68,"end":2749.28,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.369":{"text":"I watched the video of the officers' interviewing my client; J. leaned his plastic chair against a wall, his arms tucked into his sweatshirt, the room freezing.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.369.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.369.timecode":{"start":2749.28,"end":2761.7,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.370":{"text":"For an hour, he said nothing.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.370.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.370.timecode":{"start":2761.7,"end":2765.03,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.371":{"text":"In the interview with the kid who'd been robbed and his mother, with each detail of the supposed crime, she would say: \"I told you about hanging around those devils.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.371.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.371.timecode":{"start":2765.03,"end":2775.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.372":{"text":"I told you about hanging around those devils.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.372.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.372.timecode":{"start":2775.82,"end":2779.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.373":{"text":"Later, the officers brought out a photo of my client.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.373.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.373.timecode":{"start":2779.47,"end":2783.87,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.374":{"text":"Is this him? they asked.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.374.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.374.timecode":{"start":2783.87,"end":2786.51,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.375":{"text":"\"Let me see that picture,\" the mother said.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.375.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.375.timecode":{"start":2786.51,"end":2790.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.376":{"text":"After a pause, her voice dropped: \"He could be my son.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.376.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.376.timecode":{"start":2790.68,"end":2799.5,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.377":{"text":"I understood what she meant.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.377.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.377.timecode":{"start":2799.5,"end":2801.44,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.378":{"text":"The way it was easy for a bad decision to transform any of the black boys around us from students into victims or criminal defendants.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.378.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.378.timecode":{"start":2801.44,"end":2812.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.379":{"text":"And because I'd been there -- and because J. was my first client --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.379.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.379.timecode":{"start":2812.93,"end":2818.12,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.380":{"text":"keeping him out of prison and without a felony record had become my lodestar.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.380.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.380.timecode":{"start":2818.12,"end":2824.04,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.381":{"text":"But the facts were overwhelmingly against J. Mitigating evidence was the only thing that might persuade the judge and prosecutor that J. should get a break.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.381.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.381.timecode":{"start":2824.04,"end":2834.88,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.382":{"text":"I talked to J.'s mother, his teachers, the administrators at his school.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.382.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.382.timecode":{"start":2834.88,"end":2840.35,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.383":{"text":"They all told me he was charming and thoughtful, intelligent, though he rarely took the time to do his work and was often near trouble.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.383.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.383.timecode":{"start":2840.35,"end":2850.55,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.384":{"text":"But mostly I spent hours on the phone with the victim's mother.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.384.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.384.timecode":{"start":2850.55,"end":2854.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.385":{"text":"By the end, she, too, was telling me that prison wasn't where J. belonged.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.385.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.385.timecode":{"start":2854.93,"end":2861.41,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.386":{"text":"After months of conversation, the prosecutor's stance toward J. softened.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.386.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.386.timecode":{"start":2861.41,"end":2866.66,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.387":{"text":"What began as a plea bargain for a sentence to be determined by the judge -- a maximum of five years with the right to argue for a sentence of as little as six months -- became an offer of time served plus three years of probation, in return for a guilty plea to a felony.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.387.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.387.timecode":{"start":2866.66,"end":2885.26,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.388":{"text":"He avoided a prison cell.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.388.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.388.timecode":{"start":2885.26,"end":2888.04,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.389":{"text":"We thought of it as a win.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.389.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.389.timecode":{"start":2888.04,"end":2890.77,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.390":{"text":"But I knew from experience what it meant to walk out of that courtroom with a felony conviction.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.390.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.390.timecode":{"start":2890.77,"end":2898.19,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.391":{"text":"On the morning of May 5, 2017, the Connecticut bar examiners released the results of the bar exam.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.391.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.391.timecode":{"start":2898.19,"end":2905.35,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.392":{"text":"Exactly 50 percent of those who took the test that day passed.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.392.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.392.timecode":{"start":2905.35,"end":2909.8,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.393":{"text":"When I checked the website, the names were listed in alphabetical order.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.393.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.393.timecode":{"start":2909.8,"end":2914.89,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.394":{"text":"The sixth entry from the top was Reginald Dwayne Betts.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.394.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.394.timecode":{"start":2914.89,"end":2920.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.395":{"text":"I stared at the name that I share with my father and took a deep breath.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.395.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.395.timecode":{"start":2920.57,"end":2926.13,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.396":{"text":"He never visited me in prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.396.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.396.timecode":{"start":2926.13,"end":2928.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.397":{"text":"I didn't invite him to my wedding.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.397.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.397.timecode":{"start":2928.82,"end":2931.48,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.398":{"text":"He had missed four college graduations.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.398.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.398.timecode":{"start":2931.48,"end":2934.98,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.399":{"text":"And still, I thought of him first, our name a reminder of how success never erases history.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.399.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.399.timecode":{"start":2934.98,"end":2943.95,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.400":{"text":"Reginald Dwayne Betts, still connected to 251534, my state number.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.400.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.400.timecode":{"start":2943.95,"end":2952.97,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.401":{"text":"For so many years that number was more important than that name, and it might still be.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.401.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.401.timecode":{"start":2952.97,"end":2961.44,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.402":{"text":"About three months later, the letter came from the Connecticut Bar Examining Committee telling me that the committee needed more time to decide if I had the character and fitness required of a lawyer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.402.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.402.timecode":{"start":2961.44,"end":2973.52,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.403":{"text":"The committee would continue reviewing my application.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.403.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.403.timecode":{"start":2973.52,"end":2977.23,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.404":{"text":"They might contact my references, ask me to appear at an investigative hearing, look into my life before and after my incarceration.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.404.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.404.timecode":{"start":2977.23,"end":2987.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.405":{"text":"Character and fitness, loosely defined qualities, are required of attorneys in every state.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.405.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.405.timecode":{"start":2987.39,"end":2994.48,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.406":{"text":"States take various approaches to determining if someone with a criminal record meets that standard and will become a licensed attorney.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.406.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.406.timecode":{"start":2997.23,"end":3005.78,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.407":{"text":"For those convicted of felonies in Florida, the governor must restore your civil rights by petition, a yearslong process, before you can sit for the bar exam.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.407.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.407.timecode":{"start":3005.78,"end":3017.76,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.408":{"text":"In Washington State, bar examiners must determine that a person has the appropriate character and fitness to practice law before they may sit for the bar exam.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.408.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.408.timecode":{"start":3017.76,"end":3029.08,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.409":{"text":"In Mississippi, for most felons, there is no record of rehabilitation; no stretch of time spent outside prison; no letter written by any defense attorney, prosecutor or judge; no prayer that will persuade the bar examiner to confer a law license on you.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.409.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.409.timecode":{"start":3029.08,"end":3049.16,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.410":{"text":"Texas, Kansas and Missouri require that five years pass after a felon finishes his prison sentence and\u002For probation time before he or she can apply for bar admission.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.410.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.410.timecode":{"start":3049.16,"end":3062.77,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.411":{"text":"Willie Dow, a local New Haven attorney, agreed to represent me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.411.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.411.timecode":{"start":3062.77,"end":3067.93,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.412":{"text":"Soon after, Michael Wishnie, a Yale Law professor, volunteered to serve as co-counsel.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.412.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.412.timecode":{"start":3067.93,"end":3074.67,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.413":{"text":"We put together a packet of more than 200 letters from friends, colleagues and professors attesting to my character.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.413.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.413.timecode":{"start":3074.67,"end":3083.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.414":{"text":"The support was humbling, but it also felt strange to create an elaborate record to prove that I was worthy of doing a job that I was qualified to do.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.414.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.414.timecode":{"start":3083.47,"end":3094.55,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.415":{"text":"Once the packet was collected, Willie sent it to the Connecticut bar examiners, and we waited.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.415.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.415.timecode":{"start":3094.55,"end":3102.07,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.416":{"text":"I knew that if the committee declined to admit me to the bar, I would have to wait two years to reapply for admission, at which point I would probably have to take the bar exam again and also pay the $800 fee again.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.416.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.416.timecode":{"start":3102.07,"end":3117.97,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.417":{"text":"I knew that what I did as a 16-year-old in Virginia would forever be a hellhound on my trail, but I hoped that I had outpaced my scapegrace.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.417.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.417.timecode":{"start":3117.97,"end":3129.56,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.418":{"text":"The committee's July letter let me know: not yet; maybe, not ever.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.418.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.418.timecode":{"start":3129.56,"end":3136.13,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.419":{"text":"When I despaired, I thought about Benjamin Franklin Rayborn.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.419.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.419.timecode":{"start":3140.6,"end":3145.26,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.420":{"text":"J. Edgar Hoover, the former director of the F.B.I., said that Rayborn was \"the most notorious bank robber since World War II.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.420.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.420.timecode":{"start":3145.26,"end":3154.72,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.421":{"text":"Upon his arrest, his local paper, The Courier-Journal of Louisville, Ky., on Dec.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.421.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.421.timecode":{"start":3154.72,"end":3161.59,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.422":{"text":"18, 1949, called Rayborn \"the trigger-happy fellow with the cold, blue eyes.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.422.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.422.timecode":{"start":3161.59,"end":3168.39,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.423":{"text":"Before Rayborn turned 30, he had been sentenced to life in Kentucky for a string of bank robberies; sentenced to 30 years in federal prison for being caught in a hotel room full of machine guns; led a riot against prison conditions in Kentucky;","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.423.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.423.timecode":{"start":3168.39,"end":3185.47,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.424":{"text":"and been transferred to Alcatraz, then one of the most violent prisons in America, as punishment for his role in the riot.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.424.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.424.timecode":{"start":3185.47,"end":3193.67,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.425":{"text":"But by 1956, Rayborn had fashioned himself into a legal mind astute enough to successfully challenge several federal convictions and get 10 years knocked off his federal prison sentence.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.425.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.425.timecode":{"start":3193.67,"end":3208.15,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.426":{"text":"His next legal feat was more astonishing.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.426.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.426.timecode":{"start":3208.15,"end":3211.62,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.427":{"text":"Once he seemed primed for an early release, Kentucky sought to have him extradited back to state prison to serve the rest of his life sentence.","speaker":"J. D.
