JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.427.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.427.timecode":{"start":3211.62,"end":3221.43,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.428":{"text":"Rayborn again filed suit, arguing that Kentucky, by voluntarily transferring him to Alcatraz, had relinquished any jurisdictional claims it had to his body.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.428.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.428.timecode":{"start":3221.43,"end":3232.86,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.429":{"text":"A judge agreed.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.429.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.429.timecode":{"start":3232.86,"end":3234.88,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.430":{"text":"Finally free, Rayborn, according to an acquaintance, sought a job as an accountant at General Electric.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.430.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.430.timecode":{"start":3234.88,"end":3242.92,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.431":{"text":"After achieving a perfect score on an exam given by the company, he was asked where he had studied accounting.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.431.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.431.timecode":{"start":3242.92,"end":3250.19,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.432":{"text":"Alcatraz, he told them.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.432.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.432.timecode":{"start":3250.19,"end":3252.81,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.433":{"text":"That disqualified him.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.433.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.433.timecode":{"start":3252.81,"end":3255.25,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.434":{"text":"He went on to rob another bank and returned to federal prison.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.434.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.434.timecode":{"start":3255.25,"end":3261.12,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.435":{"text":"In 1966, John Cleary, the first executive director of the Federal Defenders of San Diego, met Benjamin Franklin Rayborn in prison in Atlanta.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.435.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.435.timecode":{"start":3261.12,"end":3272.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.436":{"text":"Cleary, impressed by Rayborn's habeas corpus filings on behalf of other prisoners, helped him get grant money to be paid as a jailhouse lawyer.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.436.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.436.timecode":{"start":3272.57,"end":3282.9,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.437":{"text":"After his second release from prison, Cleary tapped Rayborn to work with the federal defenders.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.437.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.437.timecode":{"start":3282.9,"end":3289.36,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.438":{"text":"He called Rayborn a one-man appellate division.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.438.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.438.timecode":{"start":3289.36,"end":3293.49,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.439":{"text":"From 1971 until his death in 2004, Rayborn was the chief legal research associate.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.439.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.439.timecode":{"start":3293.49,"end":3301.45,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.440":{"text":"In his role, he wrote hundreds of appeal briefs and had his handprint on thousands of others.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.440.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.440.timecode":{"start":3301.45,"end":3308.81,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.441":{"text":"For three decades, one of the most brilliant legal minds, with a photographic memory and decades of doing time, ran the appellate division of the federal defenders.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.441.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.441.timecode":{"start":3308.81,"end":3320.4,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.442":{"text":"All told, he spent more than 20 years incarcerated and more than three decades on the job.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.442.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.442.timecode":{"start":3320.4,"end":3327.91,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.443":{"text":"Cleary called him among the top 1 percent of attorneys in the country, and he had never earned a law degree or been licensed to practice law.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.443.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.443.timecode":{"start":3327.91,"end":3339.07,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.444":{"text":"There are others.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.444.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.444.timecode":{"start":3339.07,"end":3340.24,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.445":{"text":"Frankie Guzman, found guilty at age 15 of armed robbery in a juvenile court, was admitted to the California Bar and is now director of the California Youth Justice Initiative at the National Center for Youth Law.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.445.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.445.timecode":{"start":3340.24,"end":3355.07,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.446":{"text":"Noah Kilroy, Christopher Poulos and Shon Hopwood have also traded in inmate numbers for bar numbers.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.446.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.446.timecode":{"start":3355.07,"end":3363.02,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.447":{"text":"Kilroy served time for drug charges in Florida.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.447.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.447.timecode":{"start":3363.02,"end":3366.4,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.448":{"text":"He works as a prosecutor for the City of Providence and has started his own criminal-defense practice.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.448.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.448.timecode":{"start":3366.4,"end":3373.24,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.449":{"text":"Poulos went from doing federal time for drug trafficking to working in President Obama's White House for the Office of National Drug Control Policy; he's now director of the Washington Statewide Re-entry Council.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.449.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.449.timecode":{"start":3373.24,"end":3388.48,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.450":{"text":"Hopwood might be the Rayborn of the group.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.450.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.450.timecode":{"start":3388.48,"end":3391.01,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.451":{"text":"While serving a 12-year sentence for bank robbery, he became a jailhouse lawyer and managed to get two cases in front of the United States Supreme Court.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.451.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.451.timecode":{"start":3391.01,"end":3401.32,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.452":{"text":"Now a professor at Georgetown Law, Hopwood recently represented Tarra Simmons before the Washington Supreme Court.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.452.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.452.timecode":{"start":3401.32,"end":3409.76,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.453":{"text":"The three years Simmons served in prison for drug charges almost kept her from becoming an attorney.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.453.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.453.timecode":{"start":3409.76,"end":3416.53,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.454":{"text":"The Washington Bar Examining Committee, citing character and fitness issues, wouldn't permit her to take the bar exam.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.454.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.454.timecode":{"start":3416.53,"end":3425.15,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.455":{"text":"Arguing before the same body that admitted him, Hopwood helped make Simmons's own legal career possible.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.455.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.455.timecode":{"start":3425.15,"end":3434.77,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.456":{"text":"Hopwood, Simmons, Poulos, Guzman and Kilroy are all licensed attorneys embodying the history of thousands of men and women standing for count.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.456.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.456.timecode":{"start":3434.77,"end":3447.36,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.457":{"text":"Their stories reminded me of my long-ago cellmate Keese, and I wondered what might be possible for him if he were set free.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.457.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.457.timecode":{"start":3447.36,"end":3455.96,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.458":{"text":"More than 20 years after a Richmond judge sentenced him to over five decades in prison, and with my own future as a lawyer uncertain at best, I managed to find three attorneys in Washington who agreed to rumble for Keese the way he had been ready to rumble for me.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.458.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.458.timecode":{"start":3455.96,"end":3474.43,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.459":{"text":"Maybe we all pursued law to save someone left behind; maybe we pursued it to save ourselves.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.459.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.459.timecode":{"start":3474.43,"end":3481.53,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.460":{"text":"Prison taught me how to wait.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.460.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.460.timecode":{"start":3484.84,"end":3487.11,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.461":{"text":"I learned to break up a nine-year sentence into a million moments of waiting: waiting for rec, for chow, for count time, waiting for mail call, for visits, waiting to walk in the world without thinking constantly about danger, waiting for freedom.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.461.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.461.timecode":{"start":3487.11,"end":3506.99,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.462":{"text":"Waiting to hear back from the bar committee felt similar --","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.462.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.462.timecode":{"start":3506.99,"end":3510.84,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.463":{"text":"once again, I was just waiting for mail.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.463.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.463.timecode":{"start":3510.84,"end":3515.61,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.464":{"text":"When the letter came, it began: \"Dear Mr. Betts: The Connecticut Bar Examining Committee is pleased to advise you ...","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.464.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.464.timecode":{"start":3515.61,"end":3525.83,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.465":{"text":"that you have been recommended for admission to the Connecticut Bar.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.465.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.465.timecode":{"start":3525.83,"end":3532.68,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.466":{"text":"On Nov.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.466.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.466.timecode":{"start":3532.68,"end":3533.29,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.467":{"text":"3, 2017, two days before my 37th birthday, my mother, along with my Aunt Pandora and Uncle Darren, who had driven more than 300 miles to watch it all, walked into the New Haven Superior Court on 235 Church Street.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.467.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.467.timecode":{"start":3533.29,"end":3551.91,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.468":{"text":"They deposited keys, watches, belts and cellphones into a gray bucket before walking through a metal detector.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.468.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.468.timecode":{"start":3551.91,"end":3560.19,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.469":{"text":"Minutes later, Terese, Micah, Miles and I followed them through the same gantlet.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.469.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.469.timecode":{"start":3560.19,"end":3567.4,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.470":{"text":"Most black families walking into this courthouse are headed into a disaster.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.470.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.470.timecode":{"start":3567.4,"end":3572.81,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.471":{"text":"But that day, my folks joined my friends and colleagues in a small fourth-floor courtroom to celebrate.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.471.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.471.timecode":{"start":3572.81,"end":3583.88,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.472":{"text":"Inside, the deep, rich mahogany pews called to mind the Fairfax County courtroom where I learned I'd do time.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.472.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.472.timecode":{"start":3583.88,"end":3592.95,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.473":{"text":"Looking around, I thought about the squalor and violence of the prison cells.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.473.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.473.timecode":{"start":3592.95,"end":3599.49,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.474":{"text":"Minutes later, I stood before Judge Omar Williams with my friend and supervising attorney Sanford O. Bruce III, who goes by Trey.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.474.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.474.timecode":{"start":3599.49,"end":3610.38,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.475":{"text":"The swearing-in, for most, is simply a ritual; in courtrooms across the country, judges administer the oath to countless new attorneys each time bar results are released.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.475.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.475.timecode":{"start":3610.38,"end":3624.16,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.476":{"text":"But this was different.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.476.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.476.timecode":{"start":3624.16,"end":3626.3,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.477":{"text":"I stood alone before the judge, with just a lawyer to the right of me, as I'd done so many years before.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.477.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.477.timecode":{"start":3626.3,"end":3635.2,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.478":{"text":"Trey asked the court to approve my admission to the Connecticut Bar.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.478.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.478.timecode":{"start":3635.2,"end":3639.65,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.479":{"text":"\"You've fought long and hard with the sword to get here today,\" Judge Williams said, \"and today you're presented with the shield.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.479.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.479.timecode":{"start":3639.65,"end":3650.5,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.480":{"text":"Nearly three years before that day, as a second-year law student at Yale, I walked into the office that Trey and Judge Williams, then a public defender, shared.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.480.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.480.timecode":{"start":3650.5,"end":3662.98,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.481":{"text":"I told Trey that I had a record and asked if it would be a problem for me to work in the Criminal Justice Clinic.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.481.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.481.timecode":{"start":3662.98,"end":3669.9,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.482":{"text":"He told me that if there was anyone who should be working in the clinic, it was someone like me, who from experience understood what the clinic's clients were going through.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.482.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.482.timecode":{"start":3669.9,"end":3682.28,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.483":{"text":"Reciting the oath to become a member of the court took a fraction of the time that it took me to be sentenced.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.483.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.483.timecode":{"start":3682.28,"end":3689.2,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.484":{"text":"I wondered if becoming an attorney would fill the hole in my mother's heart that my becoming a felon created.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.484.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.484.timecode":{"start":3689.2,"end":3696.74,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.485":{"text":"The courtroom was where she lost her son; maybe it would be where she got him back, too.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.485.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.485.timecode":{"start":3696.74,"end":3703.5,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.486":{"text":"I could see my mother wiping her eyes, but smiling this time.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.486.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.486.timecode":{"start":3703.5,"end":3709.51,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.487":{"text":"Someone clapped.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.487.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.487.timecode":{"start":3709.51,"end":3711.64,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.488":{"text":"My Uncle Darren had his phone out, recording.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.488.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.488.timecode":{"start":3711.64,"end":3715.01,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.489":{"text":"Terese, who had been there long before any of this was a possibility, was beaming, her arms wrapped around Micah and Miles.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.489.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.489.timecode":{"start":3715.01,"end":3725.11,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.490":{"text":"Everyone there knew that I once walked out of a courtroom headed to prison, except my younger son, Miles, who was 6.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.490.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.490.timecode":{"start":3725.11,"end":3732.98,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.491":{"text":"Terese and I hadn't decided when we would let Miles know.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.491.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.491.timecode":{"start":3732.98,"end":3737.05,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.492":{"text":"But we hoped that it would be on our terms and not because of a classmate or an overheard conversation.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.492.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.492.timecode":{"start":3737.05,"end":3745.54,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.493":{"text":"After the 15-minute ceremony, I turned to everyone, without thinking, and began speaking as my uncle kept recording: \"The last time my mom saw me in court, I was sentenced to nine years in prison.\"","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.493.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.493.timecode":{"start":3745.54,"end":3762.72,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.494":{"text":"I wanted to say something about the journey.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.494.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.494.timecode":{"start":3762.72,"end":3766.12,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.495":{"text":"I'd already revealed too much.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.495.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.495.timecode":{"start":3766.12,"end":3769.07,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.496":{"text":"Miles, sitting beside his brother, paused and looked up.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.496.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.496.timecode":{"start":3769.07,"end":3774.43,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.497":{"text":"I could tell something confused him.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.497.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.497.timecode":{"start":3774.43,"end":3777.57,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.498":{"text":"He had questions in his eyes.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.498.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.498.timecode":{"start":3777.57,"end":3780.31,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.499":{"text":"He stared, listening, as I confessed the thing that I'd been holding back.","speaker":"J. D. JACKSON","timecode":{"type":"id","generated":true,"id":"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.499.timecode","typename":"AudioTimecode"},"__typename":"AudioTranscriptFragment"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.499.timecode":{"start":3780.31,"end":3786.82,"__typename":"AudioTimecode"},"$Audio:QXVkaW86bnl0Oi8vYXVkaW8vNjAwM2RjODktNDgyNy01ZWMyLWJmOTktOTgxYTg1NzhjY2Ri.transcript.transcriptFragment.500":{"text":"What man wants to tell his child he's done time in prison?","speaker":"J. D.
